name: Women's Plastic Angular Tortoise Shell with Metal Decor Butterfly Sunglasses - A New Day™ Assorted Browns: UV Protection, Impact-Resistant
description:
Look great without squinting through sunny outings with these Plastic Angular Tortoise Shell with Metal Butterfly Sunglasses from A New Day™. With a brown tortoiseshell design for a stylish look, these sunglasses sport an incredible angular butterfly shape that flatters various face shapes, and they're embellished with gold finish metallic accents for added fashionable flair. The recycled plastic frame offers comfortable wear, while UV protection helps keep your eyes shielded from the sun.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
